summary: Hardened rvv_generated_bundle_abi_e2e evidence for true multi-with_vl Gearbox product-reduction/dequantize-f32 executable artifact ABI. The script now expects the provider-selected typed compute chain including tcrv_rvv.gearbox_cross_region_handoff, verifies materialized producer/consumer with_vl handoff/resource facts, validates object/header low-precision resource and Gearbox scope mirrors, and records provider/target artifact ABI boundary facts in evidence summaries and self-test assertions.
